name: interview
description: Source code of the front and -backend for the [interview] app

scripts.copy:data: npm run prepare:data && copyfiles --flat data/data.packed.json frontend/dev
scripts.copy:data:dist: npm run prepare:data && copyfiles --flat data/data.packed.json frontend/dist
scripts.copy:data:optional: npm run prepare:data >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; mkdir -p frontend/dev && copyfiles --flat data/data.packed.json frontend/dev 2>/dev/null || true; [ -f frontend/dev/data.packed.json ] || printf '{"v":1,"k":["id","category_id","category","title","content"],"rows":[]}\n' > frontend/dev/data.packed.json
scripts.development: npm run copy:data:optional && npm run copy:static_files && npm run parcel:dev
scripts.build: npm run delete:dist && npm run parcel:build && npm run copy:data:dist && npm run copy:static_files:dist

author: netzwerkerei@gmail.com
